title: Xtra Juicy Chinese Chicken Noodles
description: A monsoon Chinese dish featuring chicken and noodles with an umami flavor, this recipe is gluten-free-friendly and mantecare-emulsified for a juicy twist.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
